subcodes.first_line: O God, Unveiler of mysteries, Who art cognizant of the secrets of the free, Who standeth witness to the inmost thoughts of the righteous and all that is true [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا کاشف الاسرار و المطلع بسرائر الاحرار و الواقف بضمائر الابرار و ما حق
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
